description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun with a classic design, featuring a long, cylindrical black barrel and a wooden fore-end and stock. The barrel is smooth and extends forward, with a tubular magazine located beneath it. The wooden stock has a rich brown finish and a traditional full shape, providing a sturdy shoulder rest. The fore-end is ribbed for grip, and the receiver is metallic with a matte black finish. Three red shotgun shells are placed beneath the shotgun, indicating its ammunition type and scale.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a black barrel, wooden stock and fore-end, and three red shotgun shells beneath it.
description_view_0: The shotgun is viewed directly from the muzzle end, showing a thin profile with the barrel and magazine tube aligned vertically.
description_view_1: A full side view of the shotgun, clearly displaying the black barrel, wooden stock, ribbed fore-end, and three red shotgun shells below.
description_view_2: The shotgun is seen from the rear, highlighting the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Another full side view from the opposite side, showing the same features as view 1 but mirrored, with the shells still visible below.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, smooth cylindrical barrel with tubular magazine below
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
